name: Heroes League
author: Poki
description: Heroes League is a fighting game where you step into the paws of a fearless panda hero! Train your skills on the scarecrow, sharpen your attacks, and take down waves of monsters to earn money. Use your rewards to power up and climb the ranks, all the way to legendary hero status. Ready to brawl, grow stronger, and become a true champion? How to play Heroes League? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Heroes League? Heroes League is created by Lampogolovii. Play their other games on Poki: Day of Meat , Day of Meat: Castle , Day of Meat: Radiation , Gym Masters , Cook House , and Crafty Anvil ! How can I play Heroes League for free? You can play Heroes League for free on Poki. Can I play Heroes League on mobile devices and desktop? Heroes League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
